# discord_category (Resource)

Manages a Discord channel category. Categories group channels together in the guild sidebar; a channel's `parent_id` must reference a category's ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "discord_category" "ops" {
  guild_id = var.guild_id
  name     = "ops"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `guild_id` (String) ID of the guild that owns this category.
- `name` (String) Category name (1–100 chars).

### Optional

- `position` (Number) Sort position among categories. If omitted, Discord assigns the next available position.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Category channel ID (snowflake).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import discord_category.ops 123456789012345678:987654321098765432
```
